Technical File: Time Series Analysis of State Tract-level Data

Nathan Alexander, PhD

Ethan Gwinn

Howard University

2026-04-20

1 Project setup

2 Data import

We’ll first search for all variables.

https://api.census.gov/data.html

vars2020 <- load_variables(2020, "dhc")

View(vars2020)

We will start with importing race vars.

vars <- c(
  total = "P10_001N",
  white = "P10_003N",
  black = "P10_004N"
)

Then we’ll pull in data for Mobile, AL.

mob_pop_2020 <- get_decennial(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "P1_001N",
  state = "AL",
  sumfile = "dhc",
  year = 2020
) %>% 
  filter(NAME == "Mobile County, Alabama")

mob_pop_2020
## # A tibble: 1 × 4
##   GEOID NAME                   variable  value
##   <chr> <chr>                  <chr>     <dbl>
## 1 01097 Mobile County, Alabama P1_001N  414809
mob_pop_2010 <- get_decennial(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "P001001", 
  state = "AL",
  year = 2010,
  sumfile = "sf1"
) %>% 
  filter(NAME == "Mobile County, Alabama")

mob_pop_2010
## # A tibble: 1 × 4
##   GEOID NAME                   variable  value
##   <chr> <chr>                  <chr>     <dbl>
## 1 01097 Mobile County, Alabama P001001  412992
mob_pop_2000 <- get_decennial(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "P001001", 
  state = "AL",
  year = 2000,
  sumfile = "sf1"
) %>% 
  filter(NAME == "Mobile County, Alabama")

mob_pop_2000
## # A tibble: 1 × 4
##   GEOID NAME                   variable  value
##   <chr> <chr>                  <chr>     <dbl>
## 1 01097 Mobile County, Alabama P001001  399843

3 Merging data

county_joined <- mob_pop_2020 %>% 
  select(GEOID, NAME, value20 = value) %>% 
  left_join(mob_pop_2010, by = "GEOID") %>% 
  mutate(total_change = value20 - value,
         percent_change = 100 * (total_change / value))

county_joined
## # A tibble: 1 × 8
##   GEOID NAME.x        value20 NAME.y variable  value total_change percent_change
##   <chr> <chr>           <dbl> <chr>  <chr>     <dbl>        <dbl>          <dbl>
## 1 01097 Mobile Count…  414809 Mobil… P001001  412992         1817          0.440

4 1950s data from NHGIS

Pulling in data from 1950

pop_1950 <- read.csv("../../data/time-series/nhgis0006_csv/nhgis0006_ds82_1950_tract.csv")

#View(pop_1950)

pop_1950 %>% 
  filter(STATE == "Alabama")
##         GISJOIN YEAR   STATE STATEA    COUNTY COUNTYA PRETRACTA TRACTA

4.1 1950 Shape files

tracts_1950 <- st_read(
  "../../data/time-series/nhgis0006_shape/nhgis0006_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1950/US_tract_1950.shp"
)
## Reading layer `US_tract_1950' from data source 
##   `/Users/nathanalexander/Dropbox/Projects/census/data/time-series/nhgis0006_shape/nhgis0006_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1950/US_tract_1950.shp' 
##   using driver `ESRI Shapefile'
## Simple feature collection with 12634 features and 6 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -7115713 ymin: -1188352 xmax: 2054720 ymax: 2275545
## Projected CRS: USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic
head(tracts_1950)
## Simple feature collection with 6 features and 6 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: 644314 ymin: 643146.9 xmax: 655516 ymax: 658672.5
## Projected CRS: USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic
##   NHGISST NHGISCTY        GISJOIN      GISJOIN2 SHAPE_AREA SHAPE_LEN
## 1     550     0790   G55007900129   55007900129   609036.3  3734.865
## 2     550     0790 G5500790SM0215 5500790SM0215  1573475.7  6987.540
## 3     550     0790 G5500790MC0201 5500790MC0201  1729083.9  7016.383
## 4     550     0790 G5500790MC0199 5500790MC0199  1208094.6  6828.575
## 5     550     0790 G5500790MC0200 5500790MC0200  2574556.8  9154.490
## 6     550     0790   G55007900018   55007900018   372006.4  2566.680
##                         geometry
## 1 MULTIPOLYGON (((655403.9 64...
## 2 MULTIPOLYGON (((654255.6 65...
## 3 MULTIPOLYGON (((648426.3 64...
## 4 MULTIPOLYGON (((646980.6 64...
## 5 MULTIPOLYGON (((646417.4 64...
## 6 MULTIPOLYGON (((653876.7 64...
plot(tracts_1950["geometry"])

mobile_1950 <- tracts_1950 %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    NHGISST == "010",
    NHGISCTY == "0970"
  )

unique(tracts_1950$NHGISST)
##  [1] "550" "530" "510" "480" "470" "450" "420" "440" "340" "360" "390" "410"
## [13] "400" "260" "370" "290" "270" "250" "310" "200" "170" "240" "210" "190"
## [25] "130" "220" "180" "060" "120" "110" "090" "080" "010" "155"
unique(tracts_1950$NHGISCTY)
##  [1] "0790" "0630" "0330" "0530" "1510" "7600" "1130" "1290" "0130" "7100"
## [11] "0350" "0610" "2010" "4530" "1570" "0030" "4390" "0370" "0650" "0450"
## [21] "0170" "0290" "0910" "1010" "0070" "0490" "0510" "1090" "1190" "0550"
## [31] "0670" "0470" "0950" "0050" "0570" "1630" "1530" "0810" "0850" "0310"
## [41] "1250" "1890" "5100" "1230" "0390" "0150" "0210" "1370" "0230" "0090"
## [51] "0990" "0250" "0010" "0770" "1730" "1110" "0890" "0430" "0710" "0970"
## [61] "1210" "0270" "1970" "2450" "0730" "0750" "0015" "0035" "0095" "0075"
# GIS join for more robust analysis
## NHGIS IDs are hierarchical: G0100970XXXX
mobile_1950 <- tracts_1950 %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("^G0100970", GISJOIN))

# to overlay with modern data
mobile_1950 <- st_transform(mobile_1950, 4326)

Note: 1950 tract geography is inconsistent with later decades and sometimes incomplete (tracts didn’t cover all areas yet).

5 1960s data from NHGIS

pop_1960 <- read.csv("../../data/time-series/nhgis0007_csv/nhgis0007_ds92_1960_tract.csv")

#View(pop_1960)

pop_1960 %>% 
  filter(STATE == "Alabama")
##            GISJOIN YEAR   STATE STATEA     COUNTY COUNTYA  MSA PLACE PRETRACTA
## 1     G01005500001 1960 Alabama      1     Etowah      55 2880 28696

5.1 1960 Shape files

tracts_1960 <- st_read(
  "../../data/time-series/nhgis0007_shape/nhgis0007_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1960/US_tract_1960.shp"
)
## Reading layer `US_tract_1960' from data source 
##   `/Users/nathanalexander/Dropbox/Projects/census/data/time-series/nhgis0007_shape/nhgis0007_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1960/US_tract_1960.shp' 
##   using driver `ESRI Shapefile'
## Simple feature collection with 23096 features and 6 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -7115713 ymin: -1249496 xmax: 2063676 ymax: 2275545
## Projected CRS: USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic
head(tracts_1960)
## Simple feature collection with 6 features and 6 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: 647876.7 ymin: 649658.6 xmax: 652051.9 ymax: 652544.7
## Projected CRS: USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic
##   NHGISST NHGISCTY      GISJOIN    GISJOIN2 SHAPE_AREA SHAPE_LEN
## 1     550     0790 G55007900047 55007900047   513329.8  3195.350
## 2     550     0790 G55007900098 55007900098   509187.2  3011.897
## 3     550     0790 G55007900077 55007900077   501904.2  2899.331
## 4     550     0790 G55007900099 55007900099   410814.3  2644.067
## 5     550     0790 G55007900100 55007900100   563727.8  3042.798
## 6     550     0790 G55007900093 55007900093  1117098.7  4894.134
##                         geometry
## 1 MULTIPOLYGON (((651976.2 65...
## 2 MULTIPOLYGON (((650272.8 64...
## 3 MULTIPOLYGON (((650781.4 65...
## 4 MULTIPOLYGON (((649637.4 64...
## 5 MULTIPOLYGON (((649128.8 64...
## 6 MULTIPOLYGON (((649105.3 65...
plot(tracts_1960["geometry"])

mobile_1960 <- tracts_1960 %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    NHGISST == "010",
    NHGISCTY == "0970"
  )

unique(tracts_1960$NHGISST)
##  [1] "550" "540" "530" "510" "480" "490" "420" "450" "470" "440" "390" "340"
## [13] "240" "410" "400" "360" "370" "290" "350" "310" "270" "260" "330" "250"
## [25] "220" "190" "320" "230" "200" "170" "180" "210" "120" "130" "080" "060"
## [37] "110" "090" "100" "050" "040" "010" "150"
unique(tracts_1960$NHGISCTY)
##   [1] "0790" "0250" "0090" "0290" "0690" "0330" "1330" "0110" "0610" "0530"
##  [11] "0630" "0590" "0130" "7600" "5100" "1510" "7400" "7100" "1290" "1990"
##  [21] "6500" "0410" "7850" "6100" "4390" "4530" "1130" "0350" "3550" "4230"
##  [31] "4850" "4790" "8100" "0570" "2450" "1410" "0850" "3030" "3090" "4410"
##  [41] "2010" "0370" "0450" "0870" "4510" "1670" "0430" "2510" "1210" "0190"
##  [51] "0710" "0650" "1570" "1390" "1350" "2530" "0170" "0070" "0930" "0050"
##  [61] "0210" "0030" "1010" "1250" "0490" "0770" "0010" "0910" "0390" "0510"
##  [71] "1090" "0990" "0950" "0550" "0670" "1430" "1110" "0810" "0230" "1830"
##  [81] "1530" "1190" "1030" "0470" "1550" "0270" "0830" "0750" "1890" "0310"
##  [91] "0150" "1370" "1630" "1230" "1610" "1650" "1450" "1930" "1730" "1770"
## [101] "0730" "2090" "0970" "0890" "1150" "1790" "1270" "1970" "2150" "1310"
# GIS join for more robust analysis
## NHGIS IDs are hierarchical: G0100970XXXX
mobile_1960 <- tracts_1960 %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("^G0100970", GISJOIN))

# to overlay with modern data
mobile_1960 <- st_transform(mobile_1960, 4326)

6 1970 Shape files

tracts_1970 <- st_read(
  "../../data/time-series/nhgis0007_shape/nhgis0007_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1970/US_tract_1970.shp"
)
## Reading layer `US_tract_1970' from data source 
##   `/Users/nathanalexander/Dropbox/Projects/census/data/time-series/nhgis0007_shape/nhgis0007_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1970/US_tract_1970.shp' 
##   using driver `ESRI Shapefile'
## Simple feature collection with 34492 features and 6 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -7115713 ymin: -1295867 xmax: 2146924 ymax: 3476641
## Projected CRS: USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic
head(tracts_1970)
## Simple feature collection with 6 features and 6 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: 516993.8 ymin: 627176.6 xmax: 532788.5 ymax: 656338
## Projected CRS: USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic
##   NHGISST NHGISCTY        GISJOIN      GISJOIN2 SHAPE_AREA SHAPE_LEN
## 1     550     0250   G55002500109   55002500109  129670321 77699.068
## 2     550     0250 G5500250000203 5500250000203    7650655 13962.688
## 3     550     0250   G55002500110   55002500110   14310373 21731.831
## 4     550     0250   G55002500003   55002500003    2366842  6445.037
## 5     550     0250   G55002500032   55002500032    2115668  8741.732
## 6     550     0250   G55002500101   55002500101    2132774  8268.658
##                         geometry
## 1 MULTIPOLYGON (((517219.3 65...
## 2 MULTIPOLYGON (((526846.7 64...
## 3 MULTIPOLYGON (((524634.5 64...
## 4 MULTIPOLYGON (((530047.2 64...
## 5 MULTIPOLYGON (((532078.4 64...
## 6 MULTIPOLYGON (((530383.9 64...
plot(tracts_1970["geometry"])

mobile_1970 <- tracts_1970 %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    NHGISST == "010",
    NHGISCTY == "0970"
  )

unique(tracts_1970$NHGISST)
##  [1] "550" "540" "530" "490" "510" "480" "350" "360" "450" "470" "440" "460"
## [13] "420" "340" "410" "400" "390" "370" "380" "240" "300" "290" "270" "310"
## [25] "330" "320" "280" "260" "250" "210" "060" "120" "170" "080" "200" "190"
## [37] "110" "100" "090" "180" "160" "130" "230" "220" "050" "040" "010" "020"
## [49] "150"
unique(tracts_1970$NHGISCTY)
##   [1] "0250" "0790" "0090" "0150" "0310" "1330" "0170" "0730" "0890" "1010"
##  [11] "0350" "1310" "0590" "1050" "1270" "1390" "0870" "0710" "0390" "0290"
##  [21] "0110" "0690" "0510" "1070" "0990" "0210" "0330" "0050" "0630" "0530"

##  [41] "1530" "0570" "6600" "7600" "5100" "5900" "7400" "1230" "1550" "5400"
##  [51] "0410" "7100" "5500" "8200" "7700" "1790" "1610" "6100" "1210" "4390"
##  [61] "1430" "0850" "3750" "6000" "6900" "7750" "6300" "3390" "8300" "1130"
##  [71] "1770" "3670" "8000" "0190" "3290" "4230" "4510" "4530" "3610" "2150"
##  [81] "1570" "1410" "5200" "0370" "2010" "1810" "4410" "0670" "1910" "3030"
##  [91] "1350" "3550" "2450" "4090" "1670" "3810" "3090" "1870" "4850" "2530"
## [101] "2570" "0770" "0830" "2510" "0450" "4970" "0030" "2910" "0930" "0650"
## [111] "4790" "0070" "0910" "4690" "1030" "065n" "1650" "1890" "4730" "3970"
## [121] "0010" "1450" "0430" "1290" "1150" "0470" "1110" "1090" "1250" "0230"
## [131] "1370" "1190" "0270" "1730" "1510" "1470" "0550" "0810" "1830" "0970"
## [141] "1590" "1950" "1970" "1170" "0750" "0280" "1630" "2090" "1930" "1690"
## [151] "2030" "2250" "2950" "2890" "2070" "2470" "0200"
# GIS join for more robust analysis
## NHGIS IDs are hierarchical: G0100970XXXX
mobile_1970 <- tracts_1970 %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("^G0100970", GISJOIN))

# to overlay with modern data
mobile_1970 <- st_transform(mobile_1970, 4326)

7 Building a time series

Get 2020 tract geometries

tracts_2020 <- get_decennial(
  geography = "tract",
  state = "AL",
  county = "Mobile",
  variables = c(total = "P1_001N"),
  geometry = TRUE,
  year = 2020
) %>%
  select(GEOID, geometry)

                                         |=                                                                     |   1%  | |====================================================================  |  97%  |                                                                              |====================================================================  |  98%  |                                                                              |===================================================================== |  99%  |                                                                              |======================================================================| 100%
nrow(tracts_2020)
## [1] 135

Load 1960 NHGIS shapefile + data

tracts_1960 <- st_read("../../data/time-series/nhgis0007_shape/nhgis0007_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1960/US_tract_1960.shp") %>%
  filter(NHGISST == "010", NHGISCTY == "0970")
## Reading layer `US_tract_1960' from data source 
##   `/Users/nathanalexander/Dropbox/Projects/census/data/time-series/nhgis0007_shape/nhgis0007_shapefile_tl2000_us_tract_1960/US_tract_1960.shp' 
##   using driver `ESRI Shapefile'
## Simple feature collection with 23096 features and 6 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -7115713 ymin: -1249496 xmax: 2063676 ymax: 2275545
## Projected CRS: USA_Contiguous_Albers_Equal_Area_Conic
nhgis_1960 <- read.csv("../../data/time-series/nhgis0007_csv/nhgis0007_ds92_1960_tract.csv")

tracts_1960 <- tracts_1960 %>%
  left_join(nhgis_1960, by = "GISJOIN")

Harmonize CRS

tracts_1960 <- st_transform(tracts_1960, st_crs(tracts_2020))

Areal interpolation

#install.packages("areal")
library(areal)


tracts_1960_clean <- tracts_1960 %>%
  sf::st_make_valid() %>%
  sf::st_transform(st_crs(tracts_2020)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total = B79001,
    white = B79002,
    black = B79003
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(total, white, black, geometry)

tracts_1960_clean
## Simple feature collection with 39 features and 3 fields
## Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -88.21173 ymin: 30.565 xmax: -87.95662 ymax: 30.84063
## Geodetic CRS:  NAD83
## First 10 features:
##    total white black                       geometry
## 1    285    42   213 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.1224 30...
## 2   1398   291   993 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.0558 30...
## 3    492    62   400 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.09139 3...
## 4    561    49   448 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.0929 30...
## 5    278    45   206 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.10302 3...
## 6    789    63   488 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.06641 3...
## 7    359    26   338 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.17328 3...
## 8    173    21   127 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.0499 30...
## 9    948   128   725 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.0764 30...
## 10     0     2     0 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.0812 30...
intersections <- st_intersection(
  tracts_1960_clean,
  tracts_2020
)
tracts_1960_clean <- st_make_valid(tracts_1960_clean)
tracts_2020 <- st_make_valid(tracts_2020)

any(!st_is_valid(tracts_1960_clean))
## [1] FALSE
any(!st_is_valid(tracts_2020))
## [1] FALSE
tracts_1960_clean <- st_simplify(
  tracts_1960_clean,
  dTolerance = 0,
  preserveTopology = TRUE
)

intersections <- st_intersection(
  tracts_1960_clean,
  tracts_2020
)

intersections
## Simple feature collection with 273 features and 4 fields
## Geometry type: GEOMETRY
## Dimension:     XY
## Bounding box:  xmin: -88.21173 ymin: 30.56506 xmax: -87.95706 ymax: 30.84063
## Geodetic CRS:  NAD83
## First 10 features:
##    total white black       GEOID                       geometry
## 2   1398   291   993 01097000500 POLYGON ((-88.07749 30.7010...
## 4    561    49   448 01097000500 POLYGON ((-88.07773 30.7009...
## 6    789    63   488 01097000500 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.07711 3...
## 16  1756   460  1115 01097000500 POLYGON ((-88.05591 30.7114...
## 32    32    14    21 01097000500 POLYGON ((-88.07756 30.7010...
## 1    285    42   213 01097002700 POLYGON ((-88.12642 30.6885...
## 5    278    45   206 01097002700 POLYGON ((-88.12211 30.7069...
## 21     9     1     7 01097002700 POLYGON ((-88.12259 30.7068...
## 23    64    15    46 01097002700 MULTIPOLYGON (((-88.12584 3...
## 26     4     0     4 01097002700 POLYGON ((-88.12651 30.6881...
intersections <- sf::st_make_valid(intersections)

sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)

intersections$int_area <- sf::st_area(intersections)

intersections$int_area <- as.numeric(intersections$int_area)

compute source tract total area

tract_area <- sf::st_area(tracts_1960_clean)
tract_area <- as.numeric(tract_area)

tract_ids <- tracts_1960_clean$GISJOIN
names(tract_area) <- tract_ids

compute weights for intersections

intersections <- intersections %>%
  mutate(
    source_area = tract_area[GISJOIN],
    weight = int_area / source_area
  )
